creator: devnull@apt322.org
text:
Vladimir Druzenko

This last patch I did not modify the mysql default option, I preferred to follow your advice so as not to break old installations with mysql.

In this patch I just fixed the problem with mysql.

If I change the mysql default option, I think it would be more appropriate to open another bug to make the change.

As the fix refers to an issue, should it be merged quarterly?
